summary_en: 200,000 shares (1.74% of S/O) acquired via open market for ¥55.78M against ¥70M authorization limit. Acquisition period 16-Feb to 15-May 2026 completed. Final block (40,300 shares, ¥11.31M) executed 1-15 May 2026.
title_en: Notice of acquisition status and completion of acquisition of treasury shares
translation_en_brief:
On 13 February 2026, the board of directors of Hybrid Technologies Co., Ltd. (TSE Growth, ticker 4260) authorized a treasury-share acquisition of up to 200,000 shares (1.74% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum outlay of ¥70M via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition window ran from 16 February to 15 May 2026.

This progress notice reports completion of the program. Cumulatively from 16 February through 15 May 2026, the company acquired 200,000 shares for ¥55.78M, exhausting the full share authorization but remaining within the ¥70M price limit. The final tranche of 40,300 shares was purchased for ¥11.31M during the period 1–15 May 2026. The board confirms that all acquisitions under the 13 February resolution have now concluded.
